reviews.comment:
Pasamos hoy a las 5.30 am, y "según el playero" no le arrancaban los surtidores, que iba a esperar el cambio de turno para ver si le arrancaban,por lo tanto tuve que ir a la estación de servicio vecina.
Hago este comentario, por que soy habitual usuario de YPF, en distintos puntos de  la provincia, y me pareció muy infantil la excusa del playero.
Gracias

(Translated by Google)
We went by today at 5:30 am, and "according to the attendant" the pumps weren't working. He said he'd have to wait until the shift change to see if they would. So I had to go to the neighboring gas station.
I'm making this comment because I'm a regular YPF customer at different stations around the province, and I found the attendant's excuse very childish.
Thanks
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNjdmQ0ZREAE

reviews.comment:
más caro que la chicha, muy caro. Es el único lugar salvo que cruces la ruta ahí bajan los precios a la mitad. U
es carisimo porque no tiene competencia en el lugar. Para colmo todos los micros para ahí y los matan con el precio.

(Translated by Google)
More expensive than chicha, very expensive. It's the only place where prices drop by half, unless you cross the highway. U
It's incredibly expensive because there's no competition there. To top it all off, all the buses stop there, and they're killed with the price.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocy1DOGJREAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar obligado a parar y tomar y/o comer algo antes de seguir, ah y cargar combustible, las instalaciones muy bien mantenidas y la atención exelente.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, a must-stop for a drink and/or a bite to eat before continuing, oh and refuel, the facilities are very well maintained and the service is excellent.
